case_title: BALLYHALLINAN PROPERTIES VS. SIENNA SHANKEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALLYHALLINAN PROPERTIES SERVED JAN-24-2020, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALLYHALLINAN PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHANKEL, SIENNA AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 535 GEARY STREET, UNIT NUMBER 602, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
